appDescription.message: Intelligent translator with LibreTranslate, LM Studio and Cache Server

errLibreNotConfigured.message: LibreTranslate not configured. Please set URL in settings.

errDownloadNotImpl.message: Download will be implemented in a future version

donateSubtitle.message: Open source. No tracking, no ads, no compromises.

optLibreUrlHint.message: Base URL without /translate -- e.g. https://translate.max or http://localhost:5000

optApiKeyHint.message: Only required for protected servers, leave empty otherwise

optLibreLanguagesHint.message: Languages shown in selection lists. "auto" = automatic detection

optLibreApiDesc.message: Open-source translation server with REST API. Can be self-hosted or used as a public instance.

optLibreUrlDoc.message: Base URL without path, e.g. https://translate.max or http://localhost:5000. The endpoint /translate is appended automatically.

optLibreApiKeyDoc.message: Only required if the server requires authentication

optLibreAdvantageDoc.message: Fast, no GPU required, ideal for standard translations

optLmUrlHint.message: IP and port of the LM Studio server -- e.g. http://192.168.178.45:1234 or http://localhost:1234

optMaxTokensHint.message: 2000 for normal texts, 4000 for long paragraphs

optLmLanguagesHint.message: LLMs can handle any language -- configure the selection list here

optLmApiDesc.message: Local LLM with OpenAI-compatible API. Ideal for context-aware specialized translations with full data control.

optLmUrlDoc.message: Base URL of the LM Studio server, e.g. http://192.168.178.45:1234 or http://localhost:1234. The path /v1/chat/completions is appended automatically.

optLmModelDoc.message: Must be loaded in LM Studio. Click the refresh button to fetch available models.

optLmRecommendedDoc.message: Qwen 3 delivers excellent translation quality with reliable JSON output. Recommended: qwen3-next-80b-a3b-instruct-mlx (Apple Silicon) or other Qwen 3 Instruct variants 12B+. Alternative: Gemma 3 12B.

optLmTemperatureDoc.message: 0.1 = literal and consistent (default). 0.3 = more natural style. 0.5+ = creative but less predictable. Stay below 0.3 for specialized translations.

optLmMaxTokensDoc.message: 2000 is sufficient for most texts. Increase to 4000 for long paragraphs. The model must support at least that much context.

optLmCorsDoc.message: Enable "Enable CORS" in LM Studio settings, otherwise the browser blocks requests.

optLmContextsDoc.message: Automotive, Tech/IT, Medical, Legal -- selectable in the Side Panel. Affects translation terminology.

optPromptSourceTargetHint.message: {source} and {target} are replaced with the selected languages.

optBatchSizeHint.message: Texts per API call -- higher = faster, but more memory

optCacheFirstHint.message: Load already translated texts from cache instead of retranslating

optPageTranslationDesc.message: Controls how texts are processed during full page translation.

optBatchSizeDoc.message: Number of texts per API call. Higher = faster, but more memory usage. Default: 20

optCacheFirstDoc.message: Load already translated texts from cache instead of retranslating. Saves API calls and speeds up repeated translations

optShowSelectionIconHint.message: Translation icon when selecting text on web pages

optTtsHint.message: Read-aloud function for translations via browser speech synthesis

optShowAlternativesHint.message: Alternative translation suggestions -- with LibreTranslate and LM Studio

optSelectionIconDoc.message: Shows a translation icon when text is selected on a web page. Click to translate the selection instantly

optTtsDoc.message: Read-aloud function for translations. Uses the browser's speech synthesis

optAlternativesDoc.message: Shows alternative translation suggestions. Only available with LM Studio -- LibreTranslate does not provide alternatives

optFixSpacingHint.message: Insert spaces between adjacent inline tags (bold, links)

optCodeBlocksDoc.message: Do not translate elements like <code>, <pre>, <kbd> and <samp>. Prevents errors in code examples

optQuotesDoc.message: Keep <blockquote> elements. Useful when original quotes should be preserved

optInlineSpacingDoc.message: Automatically inserts spaces when inline tags (bold, italic, links) are directly adjacent

optCacheHint.message: Cache translations -- locally, on a server, or both

optCacheModeLocalFirst.message: Browser cache preferred, server as fallback

optCacheModeServerFirst.message: Server preferred, browser cache as fallback

optCacheModeHint.message: Browser cache = stored in browser. Server = central, available across devices

optCacheServerUrlHint.message: Address of the SWT Cache Server -- e.g. http://192.168.178.49:8083 or http://localhost:8083

optTimeoutHint.message: Default: 5000ms -- increase to 10000+ for slow connections

optAutoLoadCacheHint.message: Automatically apply existing translations on page load

optCacheServerDesc.message: Central translation cache based on Python/FastAPI. Stores all translations server-side and makes them available across devices.

optCacheFunctionalityDoc.message: Translations are assigned to domains via SHA-256 hash and stored as files. No separate index needed

optCacheModeDoc.message: Determines the query order: Server/Local/Both. With "Server only" no LocalStorage is used

optAutoLoadDoc.message: Automatically applies existing cache translations on page load, without manual click

optTimeoutDoc.message: Maximum wait time for server responses. If exceeded, the fallback mode is used
